steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The prompt asks which choice “emphasizes the order in which the two lighthouse keepers began their careers.” This requires showing which keeper started first and which started later, making the temporal sequence clear.

steps.title: Find the choice that articulates the career start sequence
steps.content:
B uses the notes to state that Hecox began “years after” Moore did, directly establishing the chronological order from the data (Moore in 1817, Hecox in 1883).

A addresses when their careers ended, not when they began; C incorrectly places Hecox in Connecticut during 1817–1878; D makes a general statement about the importance of lighthouse keepers without addressing when either career started.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
